changeSet.author: hephaestus

not.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.constraint_column_usage WHERE table_name = 'chat_message' AND constraint_name = 'chk_chat_message_metadata_shape' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Constrain chat_message.metadata to JSON object shape (or NULL)

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE chat_message DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_chat_message_metadata_shape;
